items.name: last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

descriptions.zh: AI 代理技能可研究 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和网络上的任何主题，然后综合得出有依据的摘要
descriptions.en: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

items.name: taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

descriptions.zh: 品味技能 - 给你的人工智能良好的品味。阻止人工智能产生无聊的、通用的斜坡
descriptions.en: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

items.name: hermes-agent
items.description: The agent that grows with you

descriptions.zh: 与您共同成长的代理商
descriptions.en: The agent that grows with you

items.name: open-notebook
items.description: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features

descriptions.zh: Notebook LM 的开源实现，具有更多灵活性和功能
descriptions.en: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features
